name: weather-stations
title: Example Weather Station Dataset
description: A demonstration datapackage containing two related tables: station metadata and daily temperature readings. Illustrates Frictionless Data Package v2 structure including field types, constraints, foreign keys, and common non-standard extensions (unit, warning).

resources.name: stations
resources.title: Weather Stations
resources.description: One row per weather monitoring station. The station_id is the stable join key used in all other tables.

fields.name: station_id
fields.description: Unique identifier assigned by the network operator. Stable across all dataset versions.

fields.name: station_name
fields.description: Human-readable name of the station location (e.g. 'Portland Airport').

fields.name: latitude
fields.description: Geographic latitude of the station in decimal degrees (WGS84 datum). Positive values are north of the equator.

fields.name: longitude
fields.description: Geographic longitude of the station in decimal degrees (WGS84 datum). Positive values are east of the prime meridian.

fields.name: elevation_m
fields.description: Elevation of the station above mean sea level.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Whether the station is currently operational and reporting data.

fields.name: commissioned_date
fields.description: Date the station began continuous operation.

resources.name: daily-readings
resources.title: Daily Temperature and Precipitation Readings
resources.description:
Daily summary observations from each station.

Note: readings before 2010-01-01 were collected using an older instrument calibration standard and may differ systematically by 0.3–0.5 °C from post-2010 readings. Do not combine pre- and post-2010 data in a single analysis without applying the calibration correction described in the methodology notes.

fields.name: station_id
fields.description: References stations.station_id. Every reading must belong to a known station.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Calendar date of the observation (local time at the station).

fields.name: temp_min_c
fields.description: Minimum air temperature recorded during the 24-hour calendar day.

fields.name: temp_max_c
fields.description: Maximum air temperature recorded during the 24-hour calendar day.

fields.name: precipitation_mm
fields.description: Total liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated during the calendar day.
fields.warning: Null values indicate the station did not report precipitation for that day — not zero precipitation. Do not substitute 0 for null in analysis. A value of 0.0 means the station reported and confirmed trace or no precipitation.

fields.name: wind_speed_avg_ms
fields.description: Average wind speed over the calendar day.
